title: video-factory-demo
intent: Show, in 15 seconds, why Video Factory produces non-slop video — renders zero-key from code-animated scenes.

hook.text: Most AI video is slop. Watch what good looks like.

scenes.title: Hook
scenes.tts_script: Most AI video is generic. You forget it before the next scroll.

scenes.title: The stat
scenes.tts_script: Fifty to sixty percent of viewers leave in the first three seconds.

scenes.title: The fix
scenes.tts_script: Video Factory writes a reviewable plan first, then assembles every layer deliberately.

scenes.title: Close
scenes.tts_script: Video this good, made on purpose.
